text: bought 47 candles last week and i dont even like how most of them smell
my ex gets the dog on weekends and i swear he comes back judging me
opened my electric bill and literally sat on the floor for 20 minutes
felt fomo at a funeral today bc my friends were at brunch without me
the guy at pump 7 told me his whole life story while we waited
i have stolen a pillow from every hotel ive stayed at since 2019
my instagram makes it look like i have my life together lmaooo
lasted 4 hours on my juice cleanse before eating a whole pizza
bought a key finder and then lost the key finder
my laundry basket has been a chair for 3 months now and thats fine
the candle store lady knows me by name now this is a problem
judge said shared custody of the cat. how do u even do that
running the ac for 10 min cost me like $40 apparently
saw someone crying at a funeral and got jealous of their outfit
a stranger at the gas pump asked if i believe in aliens. i said yes
hotel pillows hit different and i refuse to feel guilty about taking them
posted a sunset pic but cropped out the dumpster in the foreground
my green juice tasted like lawn clippings so i added vodka
i found my keys in the fridge again. third time this month
the clean laundry pile and the dirty laundry pile have merged
spent $200 on candles and ate ramen for dinner. no regrets
my dog looked at my ex with more love than hes ever shown me
turned off the lights in rooms im still using to save on electric
went to a funeral and the wifi password was on the program
gas pump lady complimented my car and it made my whole week
hotel housekeeping definitely knows i took both robes
took 47 selfies to get one that looked effortless and natural
celery juice day 1: i can feel it working. day 1.5: nevermind
my keys have a gps tile and i still cant find them half the time
folded laundry once in january. been riding that high ever since
i have a candle for every mood including existential dread
my hamster custody agreement is more complicated than my divorce was
the power company sent a letter that basically said lol good luck
missed my own surprise party bc of a funeral. classic fomo squared
pump 3 guy and i have been having weekly chats for 6 months now
hotel pillow > my $300 pillow at home and that hurts to admit
my ig story is a highlight reel of a very mediocre life
bought a juicer for $400 and used it exactly once
lost my keys at a key-making store. the irony is not lost on me
sat on the laundry pile so long it has a permanent butt imprint
lit 9 candles in my studio apartment. fire marshall would not approve
my ex sent me a pic of OUR dog in a sweater i bought. the audacity
unplugged my fridge to save on the electric bill. bad idea btw
updating my linkedin at a wake rn. multitasking
the gas pump screen asked me if i wanted a car wash and i cried
smuggled a hotel duvet in my suitcase. worth the overweight fee
spent 2 hrs editing a photo of my salad for instagram
my cleanse coach said i wasnt committed enough. yeah no kidding
keys were in my hand the whole time i was looking for them
the laundry chair is now also a nightstand. innovation
burned thru a $70 candle in one sitting watching netflix
co-parenting a goldfish is harder than youd think
my electric meter spins so fast it could power a small village
brought my phone charger to a funeral. no shame
someone at the pump asked me to take a photo of them with their car
i rotate between 3 stolen hotel pillows. one for each sleep position
my insta vs my ring doorbell camera are two different people
added bacon to my green smoothie and called it balanced
put a tile tracker on my keys, wallet, and remote. lost my phone tho
my laundry has been in the dryer for 4 days. its basically wrinkle art
yankee candle seasonal sale ruined my credit score
the dog custody lawyer makes more per hour than my actual doctor
i wear 3 sweaters inside to avoid turning on the heat
cried at a strangers funeral bc the sandwiches were really good
made eye contact with someone at the next pump. we're besties now
housekeeping left a note saying please stop taking the towels
my face tune skills could land me a job at pixar at this point
day 3 of cleanse: hallucinated a cheeseburger
found last years keys while looking for this years keys
the laundry chair has now evolved into a laundry couch
i buy candles like im preparing for a medieval castle banquet
ex wants holiday visitation rights for the turtle. the TURTLE
my space heater costs more to run than my car per month
attended a funeral via zoom and accidentally used a beach background
the gas pump tv told me a fun fact and honestly it saved my day
checked out of the hotel with 4 pillows in my trunk no shame
posted a gym selfie from the parking lot. never went inside
replaced juice cleanse with iced coffee cleanse. way better
my key hook has been empty since i installed it 2 years ago
guests asked where to sit and i said move the laundry
got a candle advent calendar. opened all 24 on december 1st
supervised pet visitation at a park. the dog chose neither of us
landlord asked why my electric usage tripled. i said crypto mining
brought snacks to a funeral and honestly everyone appreciated it
gas pump conversation guy invited me to his bbq. should i go??
my hotel pillow collection has its own shelf now
facetuned my cat for instagram. she looked offended
drank beet juice once and thought i was dying the next morning
locked myself out 3 times this week. locksmith has a punchcard for me
clean clothes go on the left side of the pile. i have a system ok
melted 3 candles together to make a mega candle. science
the vet takes sides in the custody battle and its not mine
ac broke and my electric bill was still $400 somehow
rsvpd to a funeral and a wedding on the same day. outfit crisis
gas station cashier remembers my order. community
hotel charged me $50 for a missing pillow. still worth it
my rinsta has 12 followers and its the real me tbh
juice cleanse turned into a juice and chips cleanse by noon
put my keys in a safe place and now i dont remember where safe is
ironed one shirt on the laundry pile. the rest can stay
